Labour Pain: Why Green win is UK bypolls is a major red flag of Keir Starmer
description: The numbers alone capture the scale of Labour’s collapse. The Greens secured 14,980 votes, representing 40.7 percent of the electorate. Reform UK came second with 10,578 votes, or 28.7 percent. Labour was pushed into third place with just 9,364 votes, amounting to 25.4 percent. The Conservatives, once Labour’s primary rival, were reduced to a marginal presence with only 1,721 votes, or 4.7 percent. Turnout stood at 47.6 percent, indicating a serious electoral contest rather than a fringe protest. What had been a Labour majority exceeding 13,000 votes at the last general election was erased within a single parliamentary term.

Shirtless protest case: Delhi court grants interim bail to Congress youth wing worker
description: A Delhi court granted interim bail until March 24 to Indian Youth Congress general secretary Nigam Bhandhari in connection with the AI event protest. Bhandhari, who sought anticipatory bail, must cooperate with the ongoing investigation. The protest involved IYC workers revealing T-shirts with anti-PM slogans during the AI Summit. According to police, the protest was planned with a “common intention".

Kerala high court stay lifted: Bench allows 'The Kerala Story 2' release
description: The Kerala High Court has lifted a temporary ban on the film 'The Kerala Story 2'. A Division Bench stayed an earlier order that had stalled the movie's release for 15 days. The court had previously asked the CBFC to re-watch and reassess the film's certification due to allegations of promoting hatred.

title: Suspected Hepatitis E outbreak in Ferozepur border village claims life of 12-year-old girl, children most affected
Full text of Delhi court order: Kejriwal and Sisodia discharged in excise policy case
description: A Delhi court discharged former Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal and Deputy Chief Minister Manish Sisodia in the excise policy case, citing insufficient evidence. The court found no criminal intent or conspiracy substantiated by the chargesheet and supporting documents.  The prosecution failed to establish a larger criminal conspiracy, leading to the discharge of 23 individuals.

description: Chief Economic Advisor V. Anantha Nageswaran has expressed confidence of above 7% GDP growth potential of the economy. India is on path to become the world’s third largest economy by the end of this decade - third only to the US and China.

description: The case originated from allegations surrounding the now-withdrawn Delhi Excise Policy 2021-22 introduced by the Aam Aadmi Party government. The CBI had alleged that the policy framework was tailored to benefit certain private players through reduced licence fees and predetermined profit margins, resulting in kickbacks and financial losses to the Delhi government.

description: AI startup Anthropic's claim of automating COBOL modernization sent IBM's stock plummeting, wiping billions off its market value. The decades-old language, still powering critical systems, faces a modernization challenge. Anthropic's tool promises to drastically reduce the time and cost of translating COBOL to modern languages, threatening IBM's mainframe business model.

description: Recent remarks by President Trump about releasing UFO files have reignited interest in Area 51, a secretive US military site in Nevada. Established in 1955 for classified aircraft testing, its existence was officially acknowledged in 2013. While the government attributes UFO sightings to advanced aircraft testing, public speculation about aliens persists.

OPS Joins DMK: Former Tamil Nadu CM switches sides before polls - what does it mean?
description: Former Tamil Nadu CM O. Panneerselvam and his son have joined the DMK, significantly altering the state's political landscape ahead of assembly elections. This move follows his expulsion from the AIADMK after a leadership dispute with E. Palaniswami and a period of political maneuvering.

title: Tech startups in US to employees: Leave your shoes behind; reason is said to be China
description: A viral social media post highlights a growing trend in San Francisco's tech scene: a 'no shoes' policy at offices. Startups like Cursor, Replo, and Spur are encouraging employees to shed their footwear, aiming to create a more relaxed, home-like atmosphere.

title: Uniforms, fake IDs, pistol: How maid plotted 'ED' raid in south Delhi
description: A domestic help orchestrated a fake Enforcement Directorate raid on her elderly employer's home in Delhi, enlisting relatives and associates. The plan unraveled when the victim's grandson, an ED lawyer, confronted the imposters by phone, leading to their escape with a portion of the stolen cash. The maid and her sister-in-law have been arrested.

title: 'Shotgun wedding': Teenage lovers skip exam to marry at temple; cops thwart plan
description: A teenage couple in Varanasi, aiming to marry instead of taking their UP Board exams, were intercepted by police. Officers responsibly escorted the students to their respective exam centers first. Post-examination, the 17-year-old girl was taken to the child welfare committee, and both were later permitted to return home after age verification.

title: Film director abducted, assaulted in Karnataka; actor Aishwarya among 11 arrested
description: A film director was abducted and assaulted in Bengaluru over a financial dispute concerning an under-production Kannada movie. Eleven individuals have been arrested in connection with the incident, which involved the director being robbed of gold ornaments and cash. The motive appears to stem from outstanding payments and a disagreement over film investments.

title: 45% drop in Indians at US universities over visa uncertainty, high cost
Lauren Kyle reacts after Connor McDavid, Canada’s Olympic loss
description: Connor McDavid’s Olympic run ended in heartbreak as Canada lost 2 to 1 in overtime to the United States in the 2026 Winter Olympics final. Despite dominating play and McDavid earning MVP honors, the result did not favor Canada. His wife, Lauren Kyle, shared an emotional Instagram message expressing pride in his leadership and the team’s effort. McDavid now shifts focus back to the Edmonton Oilers and the NHL season.
